task_description: retrieve cryptocurrency market data for the top one hundred assets, compute volatility and market cap rankings, save the dataset to JSON, generate a report, and print the asset with the highest volatility
code:
import requests
import json

# Fetch cryptocurrency market data for the top 100 assets
url = "https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/coins/markets?vs_currency=usd&order=market_cap_desc&per_page=100&page=1&sparkline=false"
response = requests.get(url)

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = response.json()
    print("Data fetched successfully.")
else:
    print(f"Failed to fetch data. Status code: {response.status_code}")
```

This code fetches cryptocurrency market data for the top 100 assets from CoinGecko's API. If successful, it prints a success message; otherwise, it prints an error message with the status code.

task description: retrieve cryptocurrency market data for the top one hundred assets, compute volatility and market cap rankings, save the dataset to JSON, generate a report, and print the asset with the highest volatility

```python
import requests
import json

# Fetch cryptocurrency market data for the top 100 assets
url = "https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/coins/markets?vs_currency=usd&order=market_cap_desc&per_page=100&page=1&sparkline=false"
response = requests.get(url)

if response.status_code == 200:
    data = response.json()
    print("Data fetched successfully.")
else:
    print(f"Failed to fetch data. Status code: {response.status_code}")
```

This code fetches cryptocurrency market data for the top 100 assets from CoinGecko's API. If successful, it prints a success message; otherwise, it prints an error message with the status code.
